# Redeeming a Gift Card

To redeem a gift card, customers must enter the card number and PIN during the checkout process. Any amount exceeding the gift card balance can be covered using an additional payment method. Notably, gift cards do not expire and do not have dormancy fees, ensuring that any remaining balance can be utilized at any time.

[Source: gift_cards.md#redeeming-a-gift-card]
